mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blogger_raw_sentiments (date, ticker, blogger, sentiment_score, horizon, strategy, raw_content, channel_id, channel_name, message_time, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{date}, #{ticker}, #{blogger}, #{sentimentScore}, #{horizon}, #{strategy}, #{rawContent}, #{channelId}, #{channelName}, #{messageTime}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sentiment_score = #{sentimentScore}, horizon = #{horizon}, strategy = #{strategy}, raw_content = #{rawContent}, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id, date, ticker, blogger, sentiment_score as sentimentScore, horizon, strategy, raw_content as rawContent, channel_id as channelId, channel_name as channelName, message_time as messageTime, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM blogger_raw_sentiments WHERE date = #{date} ORDER BY ticker, blogger
SELECT DISTINCT channel_name FROM blogger_raw_sentiments WHERE ticker = #{ticker} ORDER BY channel_name
mapper.update: UPDATE blogger_raw_sentiments SET sentiment_score = #{sentimentScore}, horizon = #{horizon}, strategy = #{strategy}, raw_content = #{rawContent}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
